_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.

_contextSnippet: Additionally, approximately 95% of sNF96.2, T20210108 and T20210618, around 85% of T20210304, T20210401 and T20211105 cells, and nearly 60% of T20210106 cells were PDL1-positive
